description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its length. The grooves create a striped pattern, alternating between raised stone and recessed channels, which may serve to provide traction or drainage. The block is solid and robust, with sharply defined edges and a uniform, dark gray coloration with subtle marbling. Its sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian design. The overall appearance suggests durability and resistance to wear, suitable for high-traffic urban environments. There are no visible engravings, markings, or decorative elements on any surface.
description: A solid, rectangular stone block with parallel grooves on its top surface, creating a striped, textured pattern. The block is dark gray, robust, and designed for durability in urban settings.
description_view_0: The block is seen from the side, showing the striped grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_1: Viewed from the end, the deep, parallel grooves are prominent, running vertically from front to back.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view highlights the horizontal striped pattern of the grooves on the top surface.
description_view_3: This end view again emphasizes the vertical grooves, mirroring view 1 with clear, deep channels.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
